Why Learn React Eventually? Learn It Now! - React Router Lazy Loading (28)
Why Learn React Eventually? Learn It Now!

This post covers one of the most important optimizations in React Router: Lazy Loading. It's genuinely a big deal in real-world development. Lazy Loading lets you split your code into separate chunks and only load the file you actually need when you need it. So in this post, I'll walk through how Lazy Loading works and how to wire it up with Suspense.
